journeys.title: Manage notes
journeys.description: Create, read and edit notes, and adjust the app settings.

nodes.title: Note detail
nodes.description: Shows the full content of a single note.

nodes.title: Note editor
nodes.description: Form for creating or editing a note with a title and content.

nodes.title: Note list
nodes.description: Home screen showing all saved notes in a list.

nodes.title: Input valid?
nodes.description: On save, the app checks whether the note has a title.

nodes.title: Settings
nodes.description: App settings, e.g. the color scheme.

journeys.markdown:
This section guides you through creating, editing, and managing notes in **comment_demo**. You’ll start from the note list, explore note details, and adjust app settings as needed.

---

## Starting with Notes

### Viewing Your Notes
1. Open the **Note list** screen, where all your saved notes appear in a list.
   *(No further information is available.)*

### Creating a New Note
1. Tap **New note** on the **Note list** screen.
2. You’re taken to the **Note editor** screen.

---

## Editing a Note

### Opening an Existing Note
1. Tap the note you want to edit in the **Note list**.
2. You’re taken to the **Note detail** screen, displaying the note’s full content.
   *(No further information is available.)*

### Editing the Note
1. Tap **Edit note** on the **Note detail** screen.
2. You’re redirected to the **Note editor** screen.

---

## Saving Your Note

### Saving with a Title
1. In the **Note editor**, ensure the note has a title.
2. Submit the form to proceed to the **Input valid?** decision node.
3. The app confirms the title is present and takes you back to the **Note list**.
   *(No further information is available.)*

### Saving Without a Title
1. In the **Note editor**, attempt to save the note without a title.
2. The app displays an error message and returns you to the **Note editor** screen.
   *(No further information is available.)*

---

## Navigating Settings

### Accessing App Settings
1. Tap **Open settings** on the **Note list** screen.
2. You’re taken to the **Settings** screen, where you can adjust app preferences like the color scheme.
3. Tap **Back** to return to the **Note list**.
   *(No further information is available.)*
